outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed intraday due to positive 0DTE GEX, but high risk of volatility expansion from negative Weekly/Monthly gamma exposure.
outlook.summary: Price is trapped between the immediate 0DTE Max Pain magnet at 655 and the structural Gamma Flip resistance at 660. While positive 0DTE GEX suggests short-term stability, the heavy negative GEX in weekly and monthly expiries creates a volatile underlying structure. Watch for a break of 660 to trigger short-covering acceleration.

levels.motivazione: Alignment of 0DTE Gamma Flip (660.51), Weekly Max Pain, and significant Call OI. Critical inflection point for market direction.
0DTE Max Pain level coincides with high volume Put OI. Primary pinning target for market makers.
Dominant structural support with massive Open Interest concentration in both Weekly (53k) and Monthly (110k) expiries.
Immediate resistance defined by highest 0DTE Call Open Interest (18.9k). Caps upside for the session.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected; positive total GEX (1.42B) suppresses price swings. Dealers long gamma favor mean reversion.
outlook.summary: Market pinned near WEEKLY max pain (24400) with positive aggregate GEX indicating dealer long gamma positioning. RESONANCE support at 24000 anchors downside across all expirations. MONTHLY bearish skew (1.30 ratio) signals institutional hedging. Expect containment within 24100-24700 range with magnetic pull toward max pain cluster at 24300-24400.

levels.motivazione: Multi-expiry structural support: 0DTE PUT OI 354, WEEKLY PUT OI 61, MONTHLY PUT OI 1549. Monthly bearish skew (1.30) validates institutional hedging at this strike.
WEEKLY max pain coincides with 0DTE CALL OI 114 (VOL 448) and MONTHLY PUT OI 98. Spot proximity creates immediate friction zone.
MONTHLY max pain with confluent OI: 0DTE CALL 209, MONTHLY CALL 308. Price attraction zone between spot and support.
Confluent PUT wall: WEEKLY OI 104, MONTHLY OI 163, 0DTE OI 66. Secondary defense above gamma flip.
0DTE dominant CALL OI 259 with extreme volume 1030 (VOL/OI ratio 4.0). Unusual institutional activity detected.
0DTE max pain with combined CALL+PUT OI 654. Strong dealer target below current spot.
0DTE CALL with anomalous volume 1004 vs OI 80 (VOL/OI ratio 12.5). Intraday resistance above spot.
0DTE gamma equilibrium below structural support. Regime shift trigger if breached.
